code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut max_val = 0
  mut min_val = 0
  mut has_any = false
  mut start = -1
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_end = false
    if i == n
      is_end = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          is_end = true
        end
      when None
        is_end = true
      end
    end
    if is_end
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if not has_any
            max_val = v
            min_val = v
            has_any = true
          else
            if v > max_val
              max_val = v
            end
            if v < min_val
              min_val = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("max=#{max_val}")
  println("min=#{min_val}")
end
